title: Golden Apple to Berries
description: Golden Apple is a Berry now.
body:
Made it for Myself. I'm a Content Creator that based his channel aesthethic and theme around Sweet Berries. Made a Gapple version of it for Eating Animation mod aswell.
In a file that will be downloaded there's 3 sprites you can manually change in Eating Animation mod for yourself <3
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K4bWJv76/images/926c763d9abc643d106a14780e314c15f890d434.png)
